mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND status = 'DONE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND sla_due_at IS NOT NULL AND sla_due_at < NOW() AND status NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED', 'CANCELLED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complaints WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM bills WHERE deleted = 0 AND period = #{period}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) FROM bills WHERE deleted = 0 AND period = #{period}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcements WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS newCount, SUM(IF(status = 'DONE', 1, 0)) AS doneCount FROM work_orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT period AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(paid_amount) AS paidAmount FROM bills WHERE deleted = 0 AND period >= #{startMonth} GROUP BY period ORDER BY period ASC
